title: opt_share: unsound optimization ($pmux A input ignored)

features.name: pmux with shared wire expression in A input
features.description: Code should include a $pmux operation where the A input is a shared wire expression that is also used in a case statement default branch

features.name: ternary conditional with wire using addition
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional operator where the true branch uses a wire that computes an addition expression
features.snippet:
wire [3:0] D = A + B;
assign X = S ? D : A + C;

features.name: case statement default branch using wire
features.description: Code should include a case statement with a default branch that assigns a wire containing a computed expression
